postings: In 2025 OpenAI actively recruited for a range of technical positions—including research scientists, machine‑learning engineers, AI engineers and LLM specialists—aimed at advancing its large language model capabilities, safety frameworks, and production‑scale infrastructure, with most roles requiring advanced degrees or extensive industry experience in deep‑learning, reinforcement learning, distributed systems and prompt engineering, and offering competitive salaries, equity grants and relocation assistance.
velocity: In December 2025 OpenAI posted a series of AI‑focused openings, including multiple AI Deployment Engineer positions (supporting the ChatGPT ecosystem, startup integrations and broader technical‑success initiatives), a Research Engineer / Machine Learning Engineer role for B2B applications, and a Recruiter, AI/ML Research role to partner with research staff on talent strategy.
